You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr.Preeti Sengar is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Applied mathematics and computational Science at SGSITS Indore (M.P.).She has done B.Sc. from Government Girls Degree college (GDC), Ujjain in 2009, M.Sc. in Mathematics from School of Studies at Vikram University Ujjain in 2011, M.Phil from School of Studies at Vikram University Ujjain in 2012 and Ph.D in Mathematics from Vikram University Ujjain in 2017. She has 10 years of teaching experience. She has guided 05 M.Sc. (Applied Mathematics) Dissertation. Her present area of research Fuzzy Metric Space. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1 Ph.D Fuzzy Metric Space 2017 Vikram university Ujjain (M.P). 2 M.Phil Mathematics 2012 Vikram university Ujjain (M.P). 3 M.Sc. Mathematics 2009 Vikram university Ujjain (M.P). Work Experience: S. No. Designation Department Employer Name Duration of Employment 1 Assistant Professor Department of Applied Mathematics and Computational Science SGSITS, Indore 07/08/2012 to Till date Research Details: Area of Research Fixed point theory in Fuzzy Metric Space Numerical Analysis PhD Supervision: Nil Publications: (i) Common Fixed Point Theorems for Sub-Sequentially Continuous Mapping in Fuzzy Metric Space, International Journal of Advances in Fixed Point Theory, Vol.3(01)(2013),141-150. (ii) A Common Fixed Point Theorem for Occasionally Weakly Compatible Mappings in Fuzzy metric Space, International Journal of Advanced Technology in Engineering and Science, Vol.3(02)(2015),81-88. (iii) Common Fixed Point Theorem for Sub compatible and Sub Sequentially Continuous Maps in Fuzzy Metric Space Using Implicit Relation, Journal of Scientific Research in Physical & Mathematical Science, Vol.2(8)(2015),1-10. (iv) Fixed point theorems in fuzzy metric spaces using (CLRG) property, Pelagia Research Library, Advances in Applied Science Research, 2015, Vol. 6(6):17-22. (v) Common Fixed Points of Occasionally Weakly Compatible maps in an Intuitionistic fuzzy metric space, IJRRAS 23(3) (2015). (vi) Common Fixed Point Theorem in Intuitionistic fuzzy metric space, International Journal of Advances Research in Science and Engineering, Vol. 5(03) March 2016. (vii) Compatibility of type (β) and Common fixed point theorem in intuitionistic fuzzy metric Space, International Journal of Mathematics Trends and Technology, Vol.38 (01) (2016), 58-69. (viii) Common Coupled Fixed Point Theorems in Intuitionistic Fuzzy Metric Spaces, Journal of Mathematics & Informatics, Vol.6 (2016), 41-51. (ix) Common Fixed Point Theorems in Fuzzy 2 and Fuzzy 3-Metric Spaces, International Journal of Fuzzy Mathematical archive, Vol. 11(02) (2016), 53-62. (x) Common Fixed Points of Occasionally Weakly Compatible in Intuitionistic Fuzzy metric space, Journal of Mathematics and Informatics Vol. 8, 2017, 1-6. (xi) Numerical methods for Solution of Partial Differential Equation, Journal of Interdisciplinary cycle research, Vol.XII (IV), 2020, 318-333. (xii) Common Fixed point theorem for Semi-Compatible and Sub-Sequentially continuous mapping in Fuzzy Metric Space, International Journal of Mathematical Archive, Vol. 12(3), March 2021, 1-4. (xiii) Common Fixed point theorems in Complex Valued Metric Space using Implicit Relation, International Research Journal of Mathematics, Engineering and IT, Vol.8(3),March 2021. (xiv) Analysis of Vedic Mathematics and its Applications in Engineering, The International journal of analytical and experimental modal analysis, Volume XIII, Issue X, October/2021. (xv) Fuzzy Linear Programming Problem with fuzzy numbers, International Journal for Modern Trends in Science and Technology, 8(05), 473-476, 2022. (xvi) Some results on Intuitionistic Fuzzy Metric Space, International Journal of Applied Mathematics and Statistical Sciences, Volume 11(1), 2022, 25-32. (xvii) Fixed Point Theorems in Generalized weakly contractive maps, Journal of Emerging Technologies and Innovative Research (JETIR), Volume 9(7), 2022, 363-368. (xviii) Generalized weakly contractive maps in digital metric space and its application in image processing using Python, Journal of Electronics Information Technology Science And Management, VOLUME 12, ISSUE 8,156-167, 2022. (xix) Common Fixed point theorems for fuzzy mappings in intuitionistic fuzzy metric spaces and application to ordinary differential equations, November 2022, IJIRT, Volume 9 Issue 6. (xx) Common Fixed point theorems in Modified Intuitionistic fuzzy symmetric spaces for contractive conditions in integral type, January 2023, JETIR, Volume 10 Issue 1. (xxi) FIS Approach for Evaluating Teacher’s performance, September 2023,Journal of Technology,Vol.11 Issue 3. Projects: Nil Testing & Consultancy: Nil Other Details: Invited Lecture Expert Lecture on Fuzzy Sets and its Application in Mathematics Seminar, PMB Gujrati Science College, Indore. 17 March 2020. Expert Lecture on Complex Analysis and its Real life applications, PMB Gujrati Science College, Indore on dated1 March 2023. Awards/ Special Achievements Receiving “Innovative Dedicated Mathematician Award” in association with South Asia Management Association organized by Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science Bhopal (M.P.) held on 8-9 September 2018. Best research paper award. (IASET)17/11/2022. Membership of Professional Societies (i) Member of South Asia Management Association (ii) Life time Membership for VigyanBharatiParishad. Member of Editorial Board (i) Reviewer member of the esteemed Journal of Emerging Technologies and Innovative Research (ISSN: 2349-5162) (Member ID : 222460). List of Conferences/Workshops/Seminars Organized Worked as member of organizing committee in National Seminar on “Mathematics for All” organized by Department of Applied Mathematics and Computational Science, SGSITS, Indore during 31 December 2012. Worked as member of organizing committee Sponsored two days National Workshop on “Recent Advances in Mathematics and its Applications” held January 20-21, 2017 at Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science Indore. Worked as member of organizing committee Sponsored two days National Workshop on “Role and Importance of Mathematics in Industries” held April 27-28, 2018 at Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science Indore. Worked as committee member in Induction program for First year UG students organized by SGSITS Indore during 13-28 August 2018. Worked as committee member in Induction program for First year UG students organized by SGSITS Indore during August 2019. Worked as committee member in 35 th M. P. Young Scientist Congress held at SGSITS Indore, during 28-29 Feb.2020 Worked as Co-coordinator on One day Online Webinar on “Large Scale Machine Learning Algorithms” held June 05, 2020 at Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science Indore. Worked as Coordinator on “Engineering Applications of Mathematics” held 1 Oct 2021 at Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science Indore. Worked as Coordinator on “MATLAB for Beginners” held 6-10 Dec 2021 at Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science Indore. One week workshop on National Mathematics day-2022 , organized by Department of Applied Mathematics and Computational Science ,Shri G.S. Institute of Technology and Science, Indore (M.P.) supported by National Council of Science & Technology Communication, DST, New Delhi and M.P. Council of Science & Technology Communication, Bhopal(M.P.), held on 26 December - 5 January 2023. Two days workshop on National Science day-2023 , organized by Department of Applied Mathematics and Computational Science ,Shri G.S. Institute of Technology and Science, Indore (M.P.) supported by National Council of Science & Technology Communication, DST, New Delhi and M.P. Council of Science & Technology Communication, Bhopal(M.P.), held on 02-03 March 2023. Two Days workshop on National Mathematics day-2023 , organized by Department of Applied Mathematics and Computational Science ,Shri G.S. Institute of Technology and Science, Indore (M.P.) supported by National Council of Science & Technology Communication, DST, New Delhi and M.P. Council of Science & Technology Communication, Bhopal(M.P.), held on 4 - 5 January 2024. List of Seminars / Workshops/Summer/Winter Courses Attended i. “National Multi conference on Recent Development in Pure and Applied Mathematics” organized by LNCT, Indore on 29 th November 2014. ii. Attended the National Workshop on Contribution of India in the Development of Mathematics organized by Holkar Science College, Indore (M.P.) on 10-12 January 2015. iii. “International conference on Teaching of Mathematics and Numeracy in 21 st century India” organized byEducation for Employment Foundation on 7 th February 2015 at P.M.B. Gujarati Science College, Indore iv. Attended and Participated the India International Science Festival organized by IIT Delhi on 4-8 December 2015. v. Attended and Participated the National workshop on Mathematical Modeling and its Applications organized by Department of General Engineering Institute of Engineering & Science, IPS Academy, Indore (M.P.) sponsored by M.P. Council of Science & Technology, Bhopal during 11-12 November 2016. vi. Attended and Participated the National workshop on Research Methodology and Scientific paper writing organized by MPCST Bhopal (M.P.) during 7-8 march 2017. vii. Attended the National workshop on “Intellectual Property Rights” organized by Department of Industrial and Production Engineering, Shri G.S. Institute of Technology and Science, Indore (M.P.) during March 16, 2017. viii. Attended Faculty Development Program on “Recent Trends of Research in Mathematics organized by the Department of Applied mathematics, Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya, Indore (M.P) during 27 May 2017. ix. Attended FDP on “Optimization Techniques: Theory and Practical organized by Govt. Holkar Science College, Indore (M.P.) during 12-17 Feb, 2018 x. Attended the National Workshop on “Emerging Computational Methods for Science and Engineering Applications” organized by Department of Mathematics, Jaypee Institute of Information and Technology, Noida held on 15-16 March 2018. xi. Attended National Workshop on “Role and Importance Mathematics in Industries” organized by Department of Applied Mathematics and Computational Science at SGSITS Indore (M.P.) during 27-28 April 2018. xii. Attended the National Workshop on “Anti Plagiarism, Research Ethics and Reference Management” held on June 2, 2018 at SAGE University Indore (M.P.). xiii. One week short term training programme on “Research Methodology” organized by Department of Management Studies and Department of Industrial& Production Engineering , SGSITS, Indore during 26-30 June 2018. xiv. Attended the National Seminar on “Basics of Algebra and Analysis with applications organized by Department of Mathematics, IPS Academy Indore on 1 Dec.2018. xv. Attended three days International conference on Computational mathematics and its applications organized by IIT Indore and SGSITS, Indore 12-14 November 2019 xvi. Attended the National Workshop on Research Methodology and R Programming under TEQIP-III organized by Department of Applied Science, MITS Gwalior held on 31 Aug-1 Sep.2019. xvii. Attended Summer School on “Industrial Mathematics” organized by Department of Applied Sciences, Sage University Indore held on 11-16 May 2020 xviii. Attended One day Online Webinar on “Living the Lockdown Philosophy” organized by Department of Information Technology SGSITS Indore held on 14 May 2020. xix. Attended Online Webinar on “Advance Mathematics and its Application in Engineering ” organized by IPS Academy, Institute of Engineering and Science, Department of Mathematics Indore held on 15-16 May 2020 xx. Summer school on “Numerical Computational Method & its Application” organized by Department of Applied science , Sage Institute of Research & Technology, Indore 26-29 May 2020. xxi. Attended Online Webinar on “Future of Aviation Industry” organized by Chemeli Devi Institute of Professional Studies Indore held on 23 May 2020. xxii. Webinar on “Artificial Intelligence and Influence of mathematics” Department of applied mathematics and Computational science, SGSITS, Indore 7 June 2020. xxiii. One day national workshop “Mathematical indulgence”: A journey to cherish organized by Department of Mathematics, Acropolis Institute of Technology and Research, 08 June 2020. xxiv. Attended Online webinar on “New trends for effective teaching learning in present scenario” organized by Hitkarini Prashikshan Mahila Mahavidhyalaya Jabalpur held on 8-10 June 2020 xxv. Webinar on “Recent Trends in Mathematics” organized by Department of Mathematics, Govt. Holkar Science College, Indore 11 June 2020. xxvi. Attended Online Webinar on “Analysis of Mathematical Science and its Application” organized by Department of Mathematics, IPS Academy Indore held on 15-16 June 2020. xxvii. Attended Online Webinar on “Algebra and Analysis” organized by Shri Vaishnav Institute of Management Indore held on 17-18 June 2020. xxviii. Webinar on “Concept and Applications of Statistical Methods in Research” organized by Department of Statistics, Govt. Holkar
